overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring an NCPD officer exploring a neon-lit covered pedestrian plaza before engaging in combat with gang members. The character takes cover behind concrete planters and vending machines while exchanging gunfire in a vibrant cyberpunk commercial district with heavy pink and cyan neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza, observing the surroundings and palm tree planters

entered.detail: red neon sign with white text mounted on the building facade
large rectangular concrete planter with palm trees and purple neon accent lighting
architectural archway with bright pink neon edge lighting
illuminated food vending machine with colorful display

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered cyberpunk plaza illuminated by vibrant pink neon arches and signage. Palm trees in concrete planters line the walkway while digital billboards glow in the background. The environment is empty of pedestrians, creating a tense atmosphere before combat begins.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat area in neon plaza with concrete cover

events.description: character breaks into a run toward an enemy position
character takes cover behind concrete planter and begins firing at enemies
enemy returns fire from behind cover across the plaza

agents.ego_description: engaging gang members in a firefight, taking cover behind concrete planters and returning fire with a pistol

notable_agents.action: enemy gang member running toward cover behind a planter
enemy taking cover and firing back at the player

entered.detail: rectangular concrete structure used as combat cover
storefront with metal shutters and circular yellow lights

segments.scene_description: Combat erupts as the character runs to take cover behind a concrete planter. Gang members appear in the plaza, taking positions behind cover while exchanging gunfire. The neon-lit environment flashes with muzzle flashes as the character fires at enemies across the open plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark corner with vending machines and stacked crates

events.description: character moves from open plaza into darker corner area with vending machines
character takes cover behind concrete barrier and peeks toward the plaza

agents.ego_description: moving to a defensive position behind vending machines in a dark corner, observing the plaza for enemies

notable_agents.action: enemy visible in the distance near the arcade storefront

entered.detail: piles of wooden crates and boxes stacked against the wall
low concrete wall used for cover
shadowed wall surface with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The character relocates to a darker corner of the plaza, taking cover near illuminated vending machines and stacked crates. From this defensive position, the character observes the neon-lit plaza where enemies remain visible in the distance, maintaining combat readiness while using the corner for cover.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit pedestrian plaza that transforms from a tense, empty walkway into a chaotic combat zone. It begins with the character walking beneath vibrant pink neon arches and digital billboards, passing palm trees in concrete planters within a silent, covered plaza. As combat erupts, the camera follows the character sprinting for cover behind a concrete planter, where the stillness is replaced by flashing muzzle flashes and gunfire exchanged with gang members across the open area. The scene then shifts as the character relocates to a darker corner of the plaza, moving away from the open fire to take cover near illuminated vending machines and stacked crates. Finally, the camera settles in this defensive position, looking back across the glowing commercial district where enemies remain visible in the distance.
